package.name: Bio
package.description: Bioinformatics support (import/export of sequences, conversion, visualization, analysis). [See more](https://github.com/datagrok-ai/public/blob/master/packages/Bio/README.md) for details.

functions.name: getMonomerLibHelper
functions.description: Returns an instance of the monomer library helper

functions.name: matchWithMonomerLibrary
functions.description: Matches molecules in a column with monomers from the selected library(s)

functions.name: Bioinformatics | Get Region
functions.description: Creates a new column with sequences of the region between start and end

functions.name: WebLogo
functions.description: WebLogo

functions.name: VdRegions
functions.description: V-Domain regions viewer

functions.name: getRegion
functions.description: Gets a new column with sequences of the region between start and end

functions.name: Get Region Top Menu
functions.description: Get sequences for a region specified from a Macromolecule

functions.name: Apply Numbering Scheme
functions.description: Assigns antibody numbering (IMGT/Kabat/Chothia/AHo)

functions.name: Scan Liabilities
functions.description: Scans macromolecule sequences for deamidation, oxidation, and other liabilities

functions.name: Manage Annotations
functions.description: View and manage sequence annotations on macromolecule columns

functions.name: Sequence Column Input
functions.description: Creates a new input for sequence columns with ability to extract a region

functions.name: Sequence Activity Cliffs
functions.description: Detects pairs of molecules with similar structure and significant difference in any given property

functions.name: Sequence Space
functions.description: Creates 2D sequence space with projected sequences by pairwise distance

functions.name: Molecules to HELM
functions.description: Converts Peptide molecules to HELM notation by matching with monomer library

functions.name: Molecule to HELM Single
functions.description: Converts a single molecule to HELM notation without requiring a table or column

functions.name: To Atomic Level
functions.description: Converts sequences to molblocks

functions.name: To Atomic Level Single sequence
functions.description: Converts a single sequence to molblock

functions.name: MSA
functions.description: Performs multiple sequence alignment

functions.name: Multiple Sequence Alignment
functions.description: Multiple sequence alignment

functions.name: PepSeA
functions.description: Aligns non-canonical peptide sequences using PepSeA Docker container (MAFFT)

functions.name: Immunum
functions.description: Assigns antibody numbering (IMGT/Kabat) using the immunum WASM library

functions.name: Compare Sequences
functions.description: Builds a MacromoleculeDifference column from two sequence columns (seq1#seq2)

functions.name: Composition Analysis
functions.description: Visualizes sequence composition on a WebLogo plot

functions.name: importFasta
functions.description: Opens FASTA file

meta.ext: fasta, fna, ffn, faa, frn, fa, fst

functions.name: importBam
functions.description: Opens Bam file

functions.name: similaritySearch
functions.description: Finds similar sequences

functions.name: diversitySearch
functions.description: Finds the most diverse sequences

functions.name: Identity
functions.description: Adds a column with fraction of matching monomers

functions.name: Similarity
functions.description: Adds a column with similarity scores, calculated as sum of monomer fingerprint similarities

functions.name: Manage Monomer Libraries
functions.description: Manage HELM monomer libraries

functions.name: manageMonomersView
functions.description: Edit and create monomers

functions.name: saveAsFasta
functions.description: As FASTA...

functions.name: Bio Substructure Filter
functions.description: Substructure filter for macromolecules

functions.name: Bio Substructure Filter Test
functions.description: Substructure filter for Helm package tests

functions.name: demoBioSimilarityDiversity
functions.description: Sequence similarity tracking and evaluation dataset diversity

functions.name: demoBioSequenceSpace
functions.description: Exploring sequence space of Macromolecules, comparison with hierarchical clustering results

functions.name: demoBioActivityCliffs
functions.description: Activity Cliffs analysis on Macromolecules data

functions.name: demoBioAtomicLevel
functions.description: Atomic level structure of Macromolecules

functions.name: seq2atomic
functions.description: Converts a `Macromolecule` sequence to its atomic level `Molecule` representation

functions.name: seqIdentity
functions.description: Gets identity to a reference sequence

functions.name: autostart
functions.description: Bio bootstrap

scripts.name: molToHelmConverterPy
scripts.description: Converts molecules to HELM notation based on monomer library

scripts.name: Sequence generator
scripts.description: Create the model peptides/DNA sequences with peptides data

changelog.text: Support for non canonical RNA and correct splitting in helm
Engine based MSA
Added monomer canonicalization support
GROK-19928: Sequence space and Activity cliffs now correctly save and restore in datasync projects
Liabilities: Added separator support
Sequence Difference Renderer: Added support for custom notations
Added draggable sequence column header
Improved explicit notation conversion and detection
Added sequence column input with region cutting
VD Regions viewer no longer shows errors
Custom difference columns are now correctly restored
Tag pickup for datasync projects now works correctly
Antibodies support: Numbering schemes, highlighting, allignment, liabilities detection, extracting regions, and more.
Monomer collections
Handling edge cases of r groups in monomer libraries
Fixing some issues with custom notation provider
Isotope support in monomers
More R group validation and auto fixing
Support for custom notation provider from-helm converter
Support for complex R-groups in monomer libraries, like allyls and others
Softer detectors for provider specific notations
HELM workflow for custom providers
Fix Substructure filter for datasync
Update Bio Lib API
Sequence header: Enable for shorter and non-MSA sequences
Monomer manager: Chech both capped and uncapped monomers when matching mols with libraries, provide multiple sources for matching
Mol-To-Helm converter: Add initial version of Molecules to sequence converter
Rework User lib settings storage to accomodate shortened duplicate preferences
Detectors: Improve BILN with SMILES/CHEMS detection
Support BILN with SMILES/CHEMS rendering, conversion and Helm converter
